summary: Frontend testing completed for admin dashboard 3 tabs, stepper form, marketing page, transaksi page, and video player page. All 13 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin dashboard correctly implements 3 tabs (Kegiatan Belajar, Transaksi, Marketing) with proper state management
Stepper form has proper 3-step navigation with Previous/Next buttons and step indicators
Marketing page has Blog and Testimoni tabs with forms and data tables
Transaksi page has sortable table with clickable column headers
Video player page has proper layout with video player and playlist sidebar
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
All UI components use dummy/static data as expected
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - all data is static/dummy in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new UI features tested and working. Admin dashboard has 3 tabs (Kegiatan Belajar, Transaksi, Marketing). Stepper form at /admin/kelas/buat has 3 steps with add/remove video and file capability. Marketing page at /admin/marketing has Blog and Testimoni tabs with forms. Transaksi page at /admin/transaksi has sortable table. Video player page at /dashboard/kelas-saya/video-class has video player with playlist sidebar showing progress status.
tests_passed: Admin dashboard has 3 tabs: Kegiatan Belajar, Transaksi, Marketing
Tab 1 (Belajar) shows cards: Jumlah Kelas (24), Jumlah Peserta (12.500), Jumlah Video (342)
Tab 1 (Belajar) shows Ranking Peserta table with progress bars
Tab 1 (Belajar) shows Kelas Favorit table with ratings and pendapatan
Tab 2 (Transaksi) shows stats cards: Total Nilai Transaksi, Transaksi Sukses
Tab 2 (Transaksi) shows Grafik Transaksi Bulanan bar chart
Tab 2 (Transaksi) shows sortable Data Transaksi table
Tab 3 (Marketing) shows Jumlah Blog (18) and Jumlah Testimoni (45) cards
Tab 3 (Marketing) shows Blog Terbaru and Testimoni Terbaru with links to marketing page
Admin /admin/kelas/buat has 3-step stepper (Informasi Kelas → Video Kelas → File Tambahan)
Stepper Step 1 has fields: nama kelas, pengajar, durasi, harga, deskripsi, jadwal live session
Stepper Step 2 has upload video form with add/remove video capability
Stepper Step 3 has upload file form with add/remove file capability + Simpan Kelas button
Stepper navigation (Next/Previous) works correctly
Admin /admin/marketing page has Blog tab with form and table
Admin /admin/marketing page has Testimoni tab with form and list
Admin /admin/transaksi has sortable table with 10 transactions
Admin sidebar has Marketing menu item
Dashboard /dashboard/kelas-saya/video-class shows video player with controls
Video player has progress bar, play/pause, volume, quality indicator
Video playlist sidebar shows 10 videos with progress status (completed/active/locked)
Video playlist toggle button works correctly

admin_dashboard_tabs.tab_belajar: Kegiatan Belajar - shows Jumlah Kelas, Jumlah Peserta, Jumlah Video cards + ranking tables
admin_dashboard_tabs.tab_transaksi: Transaksi - shows stats cards, bar chart, sortable transaction table
admin_dashboard_tabs.tab_marketing: Marketing - shows blog/testimoni counts + links to marketing page

stepper_form.step_1: Informasi Kelas - nama kelas, pengajar, durasi, harga, deskripsi, jadwal live session
stepper_form.step_2: Video Kelas - upload video form with add/remove capability
stepper_form.step_3: File Tambahan - upload file form with add/remove capability + Simpan Kelas button

marketing_page.blog_tab: Form (judul, penulis, kategori, konten, thumbnail) + Daftar Blog table
marketing_page.testimoni_tab: Form (nama, posisi, testimoni, rating) + Daftar Testimoni list

transaksi_page.stats: Total Nilai, Transaksi Sukses, Total Transaksi cards
transaksi_page.table: Sortable table with ID, Peserta, Kelas, Jumlah, Status, Tanggal columns

video_player_page.player: Video player with thumbnail, play/pause, progress bar, volume, quality
video_player_page.playlist: Sidebar with 10 videos showing completed/active/locked status
video_player_page.info: Video title, duration, video number, instructor name
